title: Project Resource Allocation Plan
scenario: Create a resource allocation plan for a project with multiple tasks, team members, and available resources. The plan should include task assignments, estimated times, and resource allocations. The plan should be suitable for a team of 10 members and should accommodate 20 tasks.
constraints: Must use a consistent format for task assignments and resource allocations
Must include a note for task dependencies
Must include a note for resource availability

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the plan adheres to the given constraints.
Check if task assignments are accurate and complete.
Check if resource allocations are accurate and complete.
